'''''Pelican''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] owned by scavengers.

Its task force once attempted to capture an Imperial malfunctioning [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]] that was stranded in the [[Saila Na system/Legends|Saila Na system]]. However [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] on ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' also attempted to capture it on [[Aeron Azzameen|Aeron's]] behalf and the two forces had a [[Mission to the Saila Na system|skirmish]] in the vicinity.

''Otana'' was victorious and destroyed all the scavengers' task force and captured the droid.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
